message:
test(unit): expand config.rs inline tests (84→134) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add 50 new inline unit tests covering:
- expand_tilde: bare tilde, ~/path, absolute, relative, ~user, empty
- bind_addr_is_loopback: IPv4/IPv6, non-loopback, localhost, invalid
- parse_env_bool: truthy/falsy, case-insensitive, whitespace, invalid
- LogFormat: Display, FromStr, Default, serde roundtrip, traits
- validate_compaction_prompt_template: valid/invalid/unknown/unterminated
- extract_prompt_placeholders: multiple, none, whitespace trim
- is_valid_agent_key: valid/invalid, case sensitivity
- Sub-config defaults: Ingest/Storage/Backup/Search/General
- resolve_path, resolve_workspace_root_with_env, ensure_dir

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
